name: genesis-skill-set
description: Genesis skill set for Codex project planning, verification, and frontend web design workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, verification, and frontend design skills
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that installs the Genesis skill set: genesis-harness for disciplined project initialization, planning, tracking, documentation synchronization, verification, audits, and reviews; genesis-new-design for new premium frontend web experiences; and genesis-upgrade-design for targeted UI upgrades that preserve existing behavior.
defaultPrompt: Use $genesis-new-design to design and build a premium frontend web experience.
Use $genesis-upgrade-design to improve the existing frontend UI without changing behavior.
